_warning: IMPORTANT: Higgsfield's 'Unlimited Access History (Beta)' feature appears to be UI-only.
Transaction log evidence (May 2026): even models displayed as 'Unlimited' in the web UI
(Minimax Hailuo 2.3, Kling 2.6, etc.) STILL CHARGE CREDITS when called from the CLI.
Treat every CLI generation as paid until Higgsfield publishes API parity for the unlimited plan.
If you actually need uncapped Kling, use --provider=kling (direct Kling API) instead — it bills
against your Kling account, not Higgsfield credits.
_comment: default_video is what the script uses when --hf-model is omitted.
Currently set to kling2_6 std-mode (cheapest Kling at ~10 credits/call) since the user asked
for 'Kling 2.5 Turbo' — that name doesn't exist in the CLI; kling2_6 is the closest match.
Each video entry's extra_params are auto-appended to the CLI call.
valid_durations is the model's accepted --duration enum — script snaps to nearest if needed.

video.fits_sprite_use_case: yes — best Kling character lock available via CLI
video.note: CLI does NOT expose a 'Turbo' variant of Kling 2.5. kling2_6 is the closest Kling video model.

video.fits_sprite_use_case: yes — strong character consistency, supports 'static shot' prompts

video.actual_cost_per_call: unknown — not yet observed in transaction log
video.fits_sprite_use_case: ok — known for some character drift between frames
video.note: Mapping uncertain — UI shows 'Pro Fast'; CLI exposes 'Seedance 1.5 Pro' as seedance1_5
